headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，新片市场静待爆发
headlineEn: Obsession Tops Today's Trends, New Films Await Explosion
summary: 今日娱乐热点聚焦《痴迷》持续霸榜，《权力的游戏前传：龙族》紧随其后。本周新片仅两部，市场相对平淡，但《福尔摩斯小姐3》等大片蓄势待发。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment buzz centers on 'Obsession' dominating the charts, followed by 'House of the Dragon'. Only two new films this week, but blockbusters like 'Enola Holmes 3' are on the horizon.

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周热度攀升，续集备受期待
industryHighlights.en: Enola Holmes 3 gains momentum this week, sequel highly anticipated

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》进入周榜前五，经典IP持续吸金
industryHighlights.en: Toy Story 5 enters top 5 weekly, classic IP still drawing audiences

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》口碑发酵，科幻题材再掀讨论
industryHighlights.en: Silo gains word-of-mouth, sci-fi genre sparks discussions
